items.title: Companies are cycling through CEOs—and replacing them with first-timers
items.description: The year of the rookie CEO has arrived.

items.title: Anthropic was supposed to be a ‘safe’ alternative to OpenAI, but CEO Dario Amodei admits his company struggles to balance safety with profits

items.title: Ray Dalio warns of ‘great disorder’ period for world economy, marked by ‘clash of great powers’—just like the 1930s
items.description: The billionaire hedge fund manager warned that the world has entered a historical cycle that he believes is the most turbulent and violent possible.
